content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

May 2, 2011


Peter Sherman
DDC Advocacy
174 Waterfront Street, Suite 500
National Harbor, MD 20745

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-11-020

Dear Mr. Sherman:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice pursuant to your April 14, 2011 e-mail advising us that the American Insurance Association has decided to rescind their request for written advice dated February 3, 2011.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Sandy Johnson
Political Reform Consultant

SJ:jgl

sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is a withdrawal letter, not a substantive advice letter. No question or conclusion sections present. Document ID is W-11-020 (withdrawal file number). Requestor is Peter Sherman on behalf of DOC Advocacy representing American Insurance Association.
